title: JSON Schema 模板：海报（Agent 调用推荐）
description: Prompt-as-Code 海报结构化模板，适合电影海报、活动海报、运动 Campaign。先锁构图再写主体。

typography.headline: {{大标题（必须硬编码，不让模型自编）}}
typography.layout: {{文字位置，如 Centered bottom-heavy / Top-left aligned / Diagonal split}}

visuals.subject: {{主视觉主体（必须具体描述 — 不能写'某个帅气的人'这种模糊描述）}}
visuals.composition: {{构图，如 Single hero / Triptych / Data graffiti poster}}
visuals.props: {{道具及其在画面中的位置和比例（运动类必填）}}

content.vibe: {{整体氛围关键词，如 Epic and mysterious / Energetic and commercial / Dark and cinematic}}
content.color_palette: {{主色+辅色，如 Deep space blue + glowing orange / Electric teal + black}}

title: 运动品牌 Campaign 海报 — 足球
description: 高端运动品牌广告级海报，足球主题，数据涂鸦风格。来自 awesome-gpt-image-2 案例。
content: Design a premium sports brand Campaign poster for a soccer player. Main subject: a male soccer player in explosive kicking motion, caught at peak impact moment — leg fully extended, ball leaving foot creating motion blur trail. The football is positioned at lower-right as the dominant visual anchor, oversized compared to player, as if the ball is exploding out toward viewer. Composition: diagonal dynamic composition, player positioned upper-left looking toward lower-right kick direction. Layout: Data graffiti poster style — hand-drawn statistics overlaid on image: '78 GOALS' in large graffiti letters, performance stats in smaller annotations (速度 94 / 射门 91 / 传球 88). Large bold headline: 'STRIKE' in impact font upper area. Supporting text: 'Born to Score' sub-headline. Background: high-energy stadium atmosphere with blurred crowd bokeh, dramatic floodlight rays. Visual style: high-end sports brand advertising (Nike/Adidas level), strong directional lighting with rim light on player, reflective turf surface. Color palette: deep navy + electric gold accents + white. 4:5 vertical.

title: 运动健身 Campaign — 力量品牌三联画
description: 健身品牌三联画 triptych 海报，展现力量与形体。
content: Design a premium fitness brand Campaign triptych poster (三联画, three panels side by side in one image). Each panel shows the same male athlete in different power poses against a clean dark background. Panel 1 (left): Intense focused face close-up, veins visible on forehead, determined expression, dramatic side lighting. Panel 2 (center / largest): Full body power pose — Atlas position with weight overhead, muscles fully contracted, explosive lighting that sculpts every muscle group. Panel 3 (right): Post-workout moment, breathing hard, hands on knees, triumphant expression, sweat drops catching light. Across all three panels: consistent warm amber rim light creating halo effect, pure black studio background, consistent height alignment. Brand element: bold geometric fitness brand logo watermark center-bottom. Headline text spanning all three panels: 'NO LIMIT' in wide-tracking condensed athletic font. Color palette: pure black + amber gold + white. 16:9 landscape triptych.

title: Apple 风自然科普海报 — 通用模板
description: Apple keynote 风格自然科普海报，主体动物/植物，极简白底，底部四列信息栏。
content: Generate a 9:16 Apple-style premium natural science educational poster. SUBJECT: {{物种名称，如 雪豹/Snow Leopard/金刚鹦鹉/朱鹮}}. LAYOUT: Extreme minimalism — pure white background (zero texture, zero border). TOP-LEFT title area: Large Chinese species name + one-line evocative tagline + thin separator line + English name + distribution info in small gray text. CENTER HERO: Subject occupies 55-65% of visual area, photographically rendered, every texture detail visible (fur/feathers/scales as applicable), realistic cast shadow below. BOTTOM STRIP: 4 vertical information columns separated by hairline dividers: [icon + accent-colored title + 1-3 line description] × 4. BOTTOM CAPTION: One elegant gray summary sentence in smallest text. FORBIDDEN: No colored backgrounds, no rounded cards, no decorative borders, no traditional infographic grids, no cartoon feel, no yellow aged paper, subject must NOT be small. GPT Image 2, 4K quality.

title: 电影海报 — 星际史诗风格
description: 好莱坞大片级电影海报，宏大叙事，强明暗对比。
content: Design a Hollywood blockbuster movie poster. Theme: Interstellar epic saga. TYPOGRAPHY (hardcoded): Main title 'BEYOND THE VOID' in large cinematic display font — weathered metal texture, bottom-heavy centered layout. Below: 'ONE JOURNEY. INFINITE CONSEQUENCES.' in slim tracking. Bottom: standard movie poster credit block (mock text). VISUALS: Central subject: lone astronaut figure in advanced space suit, silhouette against a massive glowing nebula — the astronaut occupies lower 1/3, nebula fills upper 2/3 creating overwhelming scale contrast. The nebula: deep purple + electric teal + scattered star field + galactic dust lanes. Astronaut: reflected nebula colors on visor, tethered cable drifting. LIGHTING: Blinding central nebula light casting dramatic shadows, astronaut in partial silhouette, single bright star creating lens flare. COMPOSITION: Symmetrical with astronaut centered, nebula asymmetric. Color palette: deep space blue-black + glowing teal + violet + scattered warm star points. Mood: Epic, mysterious, existential awe. 2:3 vertical (movie poster ratio).
